headline: A. O. Smith Reshapes Growth With Leonard Valve Deal And China Risks
summary: A. O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) agreed to acquire Leonard Valve for about $470 million, expanding its commercial water management and safety offerings. The company is also growing its international water treatment presence through acquisitions, including Unilever’s Pureit business in India. These moves come as A. O. Smith faces headwinds tied to weakness in the Chinese real estate sector, an important market for the company. A. O. Smith, best known for water heaters and water treatment systems, is...
